findings.location: s3 — 1件のデータを更新する場合
findings.description: The source contains the note '下記実装例はinsert文となっているが、update文やdelete文でも同じように実装することができる。' This is decision-necessary information: the section heading says '更新' but the code example is INSERT, and without this note an AI agent would not know that executeUpdateByObject applies equally to UPDATE and DELETE statements.
findings.source_evidence: | 下記実装例はinsert文となっているが、update文やdelete文でも同じように実装することができる。

findings.description: PascalCase class name W11AE01Form appears in the section's code examples but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: public class W11AE01Form { ... } / W11AE01Form form = new W11AE01Form();
